messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a Python script using python-pptx to build a 7-slide emotional creative presentation for non-profit donors highlighting community impact. The output file must be named "nonprofit_community.pptx" and all content should be in English. Use the standard 4:3 Standard slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FDFBF7"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color="#2C1810", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color="#FFFFFF", border_color="#D4A843"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, left, top, width, height)  # MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(2)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.0))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_b = p_body.add_run()
    run_b.text = body
    run_b.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2C1810")

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(6), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4A843")


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E8E0D4")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4B8A8")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.3), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = alt_text
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B7355")


def title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#8B2635")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.8), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.2), "Community Impact Report", font_size=40, bold=True, color="#FFFFFF", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.6), "Annual Report — 2024", font_size=22, bold=False, color="#D4A843", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, Inches(4.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(2.0), Pt(3))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4A843")
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.5), "Prepared for Our Valued Donors", font_size=16, bold=False, color="#FFFFFF", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 1, 7)


def mission_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FDFBF7")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Our Mission"
        for paragraph in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in paragraph.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.8), "Our Mission", font_size=32, bold=True, color="#8B2635")

    add_section_label(slide, "What Drives Us Forward", Inches(0.7), Inches(1.2))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.6), Inches(8.6), Inches(1.0), "We believe every community deserves access to opportunity, dignity, and hope. Through dedicated programs and passionate volunteers, we transform lives one connection at a time.", font_size=16, bold=False, color="#2C1810")

    add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "What We Do", "• Food security programs\n• Youth mentorship\n• Senior support services\n• Emergency relief efforts", "#FFFFFF", "#D4A843")
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "Who We Serve", "• 12,000+ families annually\n• At-risk youth ages 6-18\n• Elderly living alone\n• Displaced communities", "#FFFFFF", "#D4A843")
    add_footer(slide, 2, 7)


def impact_metrics_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FDFBF7")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Measuring Our Impact"
        for paragraph in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in paragraph.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.8), "Measuring Our Impact", font_size=32, bold=True, color="#8B2635")

    metrics = [
        ("12,847", "Lives Served\nAnnually"),
        ("3,200+", "Volunteers Engaged"),
        ("48", "Communities Reached"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.6)
    gap = Inches(0.5)
    start_x = (Inches(10) - (card_width * 3 + gap * 2)) / 2

    for i, (number, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + card_width * i + gap * i
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(3.0), "", number, "#FFFFFF", "#8B2635")

        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(2.0), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.8))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = label
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2C1810")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(4.8), Inches(8.6), Inches(1.5), "Every number represents a real person whose life has been touched by your generosity and commitment to our shared mission.", font_size=15, bold=False, color="#2C1810")
    add_footer(slide, 3, 7)


def growth_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FDFBF7")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Growth Over Time"
        for paragraph in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in paragraph.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.8), "Growth Over Time", font_size=32, bold=True, color="#8B2635")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Donations ($M)", (1.2, 1.5, 2.1, 2.8, 3.6, 4.9))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.6), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Donations ($M)"
    value_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5), "Donations have grown 308% since 2019 — a testament to your continued trust and support.", font_size=14, bold=False, color="#2C1810")
    add_footer(slide, 4, 7)


def stories_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FDFBF7")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Voices of Change"
        for paragraph in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in paragraph.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.8), "Voices of Change", font_size=32, bold=True, color="#8B2635")

    add_section_label(slide, "Real Stories from Our Community", Inches(0.7), Inches(1.2))

    quote1 = '"This program gave my children the education they needed to dream bigger than I ever could. We are forever grateful."'
    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.5), "", quote1, "#FFFFFF", "#D4A843")

    attr_box1 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.9), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.9), Inches(0.5))
    tf1 = attr_box1.text_frame
    p1 = tf1.paragraphs[0]
    run1 = p1.add_run()
    run1.text = "— Maria S., Program Participant"
    run1.font.size = Pt(12)
    run1.font.italic = True
    run1.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    quote2 = '"The volunteer mentors showed me that someone cared about my future. Today I am a college student because of them."'
    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.0), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.5), "", quote2, "#FFFFFF", "#D4A843")

    attr_box2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(5.2), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.9), Inches(0.5))
    tf2 = attr_box2.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "— James T., Youth Program Graduate"
    run2.font.size = Pt(12)
    run2.font.italic = True
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    add_footer(slide, 5, 7)


def transparency_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FDFBF7")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Your Impact, Transparently"
        for paragraph in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in paragraph.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.8), "Your Impact, Transparently", font_size=32, bold=True, color="#8B2635")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Programs", "Administration", "Fundraising"]
    chart_data.add_series("Budget Allocation (%)", (72, 15, 13))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.4), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    pie = plot.series[0]
    pie.format.fill.solid()
    pie.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    legend = chart.has_legend
    if legend:
        chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    stat_labels = [
        ("72%", "Programs"),
        ("15%", "Admin"),
        ("13%", "Fundraising"),
    ]
    colors = ["#8B2635", "#D4A843", "#C4956A"]

    for i, (pct, label) in enumerate(stat_labels):
        x = Inches(0.7 + 4.7 + 0.3 + (i * 1.8))
        y = Inches(2.5)
        add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(1.6), Inches(0.5), pct, font_size=24, bold=True, color=colors[i], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x, y + Inches(0.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=12, bold=False, color="#2C1810", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 7)


def call_to_action_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#8B2635")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.2), "Join Us in Making a Difference", font_size=40, bold=True, color="#FFFFFF", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.6), "Your generosity changes lives every single day.", font_size=22, bold=False, color="#D4A843", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, Inches(4.0), Inches(3.7), Inches(2.0), Pt(3))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4A843")
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.5), "Donate today at www.example.org/donate\nOr call us at (555) 123-4567", font_size=18, bold=False, color="#FFFFFF", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Thank you for believing in our mission.", font_size=16, bold=True, color="#D4A843", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 7, 7)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(10.0)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(7.5)

    title_slide(prs)
    mission_slide(prs)
    impact_metrics_slide(prs)
    growth_chart_slide(prs)
    stories_slide(prs)
    transparency_slide(prs)
    call_to_action_slide(prs)

    prs.save("nonprofit_community.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
